annotation.text: This is a holdover from when you thought the agent should be asking the questions. The precision tendency is real, though. Over-prescribing can definitely lead to a false precision that can force the agent to commit unnatural acts to satisfy the letter of your command.
annotation.anchor: Data: 10 fabrication corrections in 76 sessions, all "agent acted on a fact it invented" (Google Drive creds, OPFS absence, file paths).
